# SmoothSend

SmoothSend is a gasless stablecoin payment protocol for Web3 developers.
It enables USDC and USDT transfers on Aptos, Arbitrum, Base, and Avalanche
without requiring users to hold native gas tokens (ETH or APT).

SmoothSend uses ERC-4337 account abstraction on EVM chains and Aptos native
sponsored transactions. A 0.25% relayer fee is deducted from the sent amount.
Testnet usage is free.

## SDK

npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@smoothsend/sdk
Install: npm install @smoothsend/sdk

## Documentation

https://docs.smoothsend.xyz

## Dashboard (API Keys)

https://dashboard.smoothsend.xyz

## dApps

- EVM (Base, Arbitrum, Avalanche): https://evm.smoothsend.xyz
- Aptos: https://aptos.smoothsend.xyz

## GitHub

https://github.com/smoothsend
